title: ProcessedEventRecord
description: A complete record of a message that has been processed for events. Stored in processed/ directory as JSONL.

message_id.description: Unique message ID within the channel

message_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the message was posted

success.description: True if processing succeeded (regardless of whether events were found)

error.description: Error message if processing failed, null if success=true

events.description: List of extracted events. Empty array if no events found in the message.

title.description: Event title exactly as stated in the text

description.description: Additional event details from the text

place.description: Venue or location exactly as written in the text

datetime.description: Date and time in the original format from the text

start_datetime.description: Calculated fixed ISO 8601 date and time of the event start

short_description.description: Short description of the event combining its details

type.description: Event type from the allowed list

confidence.description: Confidence score 1-5 based on completeness of extracted data

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this message was processed

run_id.description: Unique identifier of the processing run (e.g., '20260415T192954Z')

model_name.description: Name of the LLM model used for processing (e.g., 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

model_config.description: LLM configuration parameters used for this processing
